assertions.description: U301 is an MCP23S17_SO, an SPI-interface GPIO expander. Its SPI pins (SCK -> SPI_CLK, SI -> SPI_COPI, ~CS -> ~{SPI_CS}) are listed in single_pin_nets but no spi_buses entry is generated. The SPI bus signals are clearly named but the SPI detector does not trigger on MCP23S17 pin names.
